column1: # common_snps_grch38_smoke — illustrative 12-site smoke panel for liquidqc
# Phase 4 Tier 3 SNP fingerprinting. NOT a substitute for a real common-SNP
# panel. For production cohort-level concordance use a full somalier-style
# site list (~17.5k common autosomal SNPs) supplied via `--snp-panel <path>`.
# Sites picked for v1 smoke testing only — high-frequency dbSNP common
# variants in transcribed regions, GRCh38 coordinates. Sources:
